pc.title: Gym Management PC
pc.error.max_level: This upgrade is already at max level.
pc.error.scoreboard_not_found: Economy scoreboard not found. Ask an admin to set it up.
pc.tier_up: Tier up! You are now Tier %s.
pc.upgrade.floor_upgrade.name: Floor Upgrade
pc.upgrade.floor_upgrade.desc: Improve your gym's flooring. Better floors attract more clients.
pc.upgrade.wall_upgrade.name: Wall Upgrade
pc.upgrade.wall_upgrade.desc: Renovate the walls for a more professional look.
pc.upgrade.lighting_upgrade.name: Lighting Upgrade
pc.upgrade.lighting_upgrade.desc: Install better lighting to improve the atmosphere.
pc.upgrade.equipment_upgrade.name: Equipment Upgrade
pc.upgrade.equipment_upgrade.desc: Upgrade your gym equipment to attract serious athletes.
pc.upgrade.floor_t2.name: Premium Floor
pc.upgrade.floor_t2.desc: Install high-quality flooring in your new gym.
pc.upgrade.wall_t2.name: Modern Walls
pc.upgrade.wall_t2.desc: Renovate the walls of the second gym with premium materials.
pc.upgrade.exterior_upgrade.name: Exterior Upgrade
pc.upgrade.exterior_upgrade.desc: Improve the outside of your gym. First impressions matter.
pc.upgrade.trainer.name: Personal Trainer
pc.upgrade.trainer.desc: Hire a personal trainer to boost client satisfaction and income.
pc.upgrade.trainer_t2.name: Personal Trainer
pc.upgrade.trainer_t2.desc: Hire a personal trainer for the new gym.
pc.upgrade.manager.name: Gym Manager
pc.upgrade.manager.desc: A manager keeps things running smoothly, reducing downtime.
pc.upgrade.nutritionist.name: Nutritionist
pc.upgrade.nutritionist.desc: Offer nutrition advice to retain clients longer.
pc.upgrade.marketing.name: Marketing Campaign
pc.upgrade.marketing.desc: Run campaigns to attract new clients and boost passive income.
pc.upgrade.income_basic.name: Basic Revenue Stream
pc.upgrade.income_basic.desc: Set up a basic passive income stream for your gym.
pc.upgrade.income_advanced.name: Advanced Revenue Stream
pc.upgrade.income_advanced.desc: Diversify income with membership plans and merchandise.
pc.upgrade.income_premium.name: Premium Revenue Stream
pc.upgrade.income_premium.desc: Unlock premium services like VIP memberships and events.
pc.upgrade.speed_boost.name: Speed Training
pc.upgrade.speed_boost.desc: Faster service means happier clients and more income per second.
pc.upgrade.efficiency.name: Efficiency Training
pc.upgrade.efficiency.desc: Optimise gym operations — less waste, more revenue every second.
pc.upgrade.better_equipment.name: Better Equipment
pc.upgrade.better_equipment.desc: Upgrade to premium machines that attract serious athletes and boost income.
pc.upgrade.decoration.name: Gym Decoration
pc.upgrade.decoration.desc: Give your gym a polished look. Clients stay longer and spend more.
pc.upgrade.premium_equipment.name: Premium Equipment
pc.upgrade.premium_equipment.desc: Install elite-grade equipment. Only the best gyms have it.
pc.upgrade.full_gym.name: Full Gym
pc.upgrade.full_gym.desc: Offer a complete gym experience — every client finds exactly what they need.
pc.upgrade.elite_trainer.name: Elite Trainer
pc.upgrade.elite_trainer.desc: Hire a world-class trainer. Reputation skyrockets, income follows.
pc.upgrade.senior_manager.name: Senior Manager
pc.upgrade.senior_manager.desc: A veteran manager optimises every aspect of your gym's operations.
pc.upgrade.vip_lounge.name: VIP Lounge
pc.upgrade.vip_lounge.desc: Open an exclusive lounge for top-tier members. Premium clients pay premium prices.
pc.upgrade.head_coach.name: Head Coach
pc.upgrade.head_coach.desc: Appoint a championship-level head coach. The best talent flocks to your gym.
pc.upgrade.sponsorship.name: Sponsorship Deal
pc.upgrade.sponsorship.desc: Secure corporate sponsors. Brand money flows in every second.
pc.upgrade.production_rate.name: Production Rate
pc.upgrade.production_rate.desc: Push your gym's output to the absolute limit and earn more per second.
item.tycooncore.repair_kit.tooltip: §7Use it at the PC to pay part of the penalty and resolve the sabotage.
item.tycooncore.technician_repair_kit.to: §7Right-click a sabotaged player to repair their systems as a technician.
pc.sabotage.title: §c⚠ §f§lSYSTEM COMPROMISED §c⚠
pc.sabotage.subtitle: §7Passive income is §cblocked
tycoon.sabotage.started: §c[Sabotage] §7Your gym has been compromised! Passive income is §cblocked§7. Resolve within §e%ss§7 or lose §c%s§7.
tycoon.sabotage.pay.no_money: §c[Sabotage] §7You need §c%s§7 to pay for repairs. (You have §c%s§7)
tycoon.sabotage.item.no_kit: §c[Sabotage] §7You need §e1 Repair Kit§7 in your inventory to use this solution.
tycoon.sabotage.item.resolved: §a[Sabotage] §7Used a §eRepair Kit§7 to fix the sabotaged systems. All good!
tycoon.sabotage.tech.already_called: §e[Sabotage] §7You already called a technician. Wait for them to arrive.
tycoon.sabotage.tech.requested: §e[Sabotage] §7Technician requested! A technician will come to check your gym. §8(Stay near the PC)
tycoon.sabotage.tech.broadcast: §e[Technician] §f%s §7has requested a technician for their sabotage. Use the §eTechnician Kit§7 to go and repair.
tycoon.sabotage.tech.resolved_victim: §a[Sabotage] §7Technician §f%s§7 has repaired your systems. Income restored!
tycoon.sabotage.expired: §c[Sabotage] §7Time's up! §c%s§7 has been deducted as a penalty.
tycoon.income.no_scoreboard: §c[Gym] §7Economy scoreboard not configured. Contact an admin.
tycoon.night.login_closed: §c[Gym] §7Your gym was open but it is now night. §8Reopen at dawn.
tycoon.night.closed: §c✦ [Gym] §7Night has fallen! Your gym has closed. §8Reopen at dawn to keep earning.
tycoon.night.dawn: §e✦ [Gym] §7Dawn has arrived! You can open your gym now.
tycoon.night.blocked: §c[Gym] §7You cannot open the gym at night. Wait for dawn!
tycoon.cmd.no_player: Run from a command block: /tycoon gym %s <player>
tycoon.tech.self_repair: §c[Technician] §7You cannot repair your own sabotage with this kit.
item.tycooncore.supervisor_clipboard.too: §7Right-click a player to approve their tier-up.
pc.tier_ready: §e[Tier Up] §7You have completed all required upgrades! Find a supervisor to advance to the next tier.
tycoon.supervisor.already_max_tier: §c[Supervisor] §7%s is already at the maximum tier.
tycoon.supervisor.not_ready: §c[Supervisor] §7%s is not ready yet. Progress: §e%s§7/§e%s§7 upgrades.
tycoon.supervisor.started_target: §a[Supervisor] §7%s has approved your tier-up! Advancing in §e%s§a seconds...
